title: stevia chiapensis
intro: Stevia chiapensis, also known as the Mexican stevia, is a plant species in the sunflower family (Asteraceae) native to Mexico and Central America. The plant contains medicinal properties due to its high concentration of steviol glycosides, which are responsible for its sweet taste and various health benefits. Stevia chiapensis is used to treat conditions such as high blood pressure, diabetes, and digestive issues due to its ability to lower blood sugar levels and improve insulin sensitivity. Stevia chiapensis can be prepared as a herbal tea, powder, or extract, and is also used as a natural sweetener in food and beverages.
